source_brief: User requested changing the promo image to one person in a cafe with the screen showing kobe.

design_rationale.subject: kobe, shown as a real terminal workflow on a cafe laptop screen
design_rationale.audience: developers who work from laptops, terminals, cafes, SSH sessions, and local devboxes
design_rationale.single_job: make kobe feel usable in an everyday developer workflow while keeping the TUI legible on screen
design_rationale.signature_element: a laptop in a quiet cafe with the real kobe TUI visible as the screen content
design_rationale.revision_note: This is a new cafe-launch variant rather than a replacement for the existing lunar or clean product-promo variants.
